title: アルダンの寄り道講座・追憶編

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Pardon me, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Do you want to go on another detour?
Do you want to go on another detour?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. ...Hehe. Did you figure it out from my
fidgeting?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The thought of happening upon yet another
wonderful discovery while walking with you... It
made my heart sing, you see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Ardan and I pick a direction
and start walking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan comes to a sudden stop in front of a
greengrocer in the shopping district. I can see her
staring intently at something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, do these apples not look absolutely
delicious?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow her gaze to see a ton of red, beautifully
ripe apples lined up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to purchase a few. Please wait here a
moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now then... back to our detour. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she wants to find a park where we can sit
down and eat the apples? As I'm thinking through
all the possible places where we might end up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oddly enough, Mejiro Ardan leads me back to my
office at the academy.
choice_data_list: ...Huh? What happened to the detour?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a funny thing to say. We're still very
much in the midst of the detour!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Our outings usually end once we return to campus and go our separate ways, yes? But couldn't you say that coming here with our souvenirs has made this something of a detour?
choice_data_list: So that's how it works...
So that's how it works...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It is indeed! ♪ Now, I shall set about peeling the
apples.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now, please enjoy.
choice_data_list: They look delicious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
An apple a day keeps the doctor away. Apples
are so nutritious that there's a saying about them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My nanny always used to peel apples for me when
I was younger, so I do believe that I know a good
apple when I see one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: It's great!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm glad. I'm very partial to this type of
apple myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Though, I have mixed feelings about the fruit
itself.
choice_data_list: Why's that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Most of the times I've been given apples to eat
were when I was sick in bed... or at the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The apples Nanny prepared for me at such times
always had a soft, reassuring flavor... To me, that
was how apples tasted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As if the reality of my situation was sinking in
deeper with every bite.
choice_data_list: Then... why now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I found myself wanting to know for
sure—whether I'd feel differently about the taste
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've learned both to run and to enjoy these lovely
detours with you. Perhaps given how I've
changed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: How is it?
How is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It tastes as sweet as it did in my youth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And yet... I feel as though this sweetness is
conjuring some new emotions that weren't there
before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Courage and a sense of vitality. This taste gives
me the strength to face hardships alongside those
who support me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I doubt I could have experienced such a taste if
I were eating this apple alone right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Strange, isn't it? From tiny details to
treacherous paths... Everything's cast in a
different light when we're together.
choice_data_list: I want to keep going on all kinds of detours.
I want to keep going on all kinds of detours.
I'll stand by your side anytime, anywhere!
I'll stand by your side anytime, anywhere!
Sounds like you've had a good rest.
Sounds like you've had a good rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Strange, isn't it? From tiny details to
treacherous paths... Everything's cast in a
different light when we're together.
choice_data_list: I want to keep going on all kinds of detours.
I want to keep going on all kinds of detours.
I'll stand by your side anytime, anywhere!
I'll stand by your side anytime, anywhere!
Sounds like you've had a good rest.
Sounds like you've had a good rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
By all means. I'm very much looking forward to
doing so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...For me, any race could be my last. And I commit
all I have to every one I run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But then... the thought of a peacefully pleasant
tomorrow... Well, that's wonderful too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yes, I believe you would.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No matter what challenges may arise, let us work
hand in hand to overcome them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But... in the event that fatigue does catch up with
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I may need to take a brief rest on your shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, today's detour has turned into yet another
wonderful experience. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's because I spend some of my time on
endeavors such as these that I'm able to clear my
head, switch gears, and focus solely on achieving
my goals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to racing, I simply set my sights on
the goal and run. It's clear and simple.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Since, even beyond the goal, something
wondrous awaits—something we can only
experience together.
